sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 GAAP 매출 65억 달러로 전년 대비 3.5% 증가, 조정 매출 63억 달러로 유기적 성장률 3.2%였습니다.
조정 주당순이익은 2.19달러로 전년 대비 10% 증가했으며, GAAP 주당순이익은 1.55달러로 38% 감소했습니다.
강한 실적을 바탕으로 연간 마진 및 주당순이익 가이던스를 상향했습니다.

riskChanges.text: GAAP 주당순이익 38% 감소는 소송 비용 및 PFAS 제조 관련 특별 항목 때문이며, 조정 기준으로는 10% 증가로 실질 수익성은 개선됐습니다.

businessChanges.text: 경영진은 유기적 매출 성장, 마진 개선, 두 자릿수 이익 성장, 견조한 잉여현금흐름 창출이라는 연초 목표가 궤도에 있다고 평가했습니다.
PFAS 제조 제품을 제외한 조정 매출 기준 유기적 성장률이 3.2%로, 매크로 대비 상회하는 성장을 시현했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 영업현금흐름 18억 달러, 조정 잉여현금흐름 13억 달러를 기록했습니다.
상향된 연간 가이던스 기준 조정 주당순이익 7.95달러~8.05달러, 조정 영업현금흐름 54억 달러 수준을 제시했습니다.
3분기 부문별 영업이익(조정)은 9억 달러를 포함해 전반적으로 전년 대비 증가세를 이어갔습니다.

watchItems.text: GAAP 기준 소송 및 PFAS 비용이 지속적으로 이익을 압박하는 구조이므로, 조정 vs GAAP 괴리 해소 시점이 투자 포인트입니다.
연간 가이던스 상향과 3분기 호실적으로 모멘텀이 긍정적이나, 유기적 매출 성장의 지속성과 PFAS 관련 리스크 해소 속도가 핵심 변수입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q32025-8kerexx991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 3M Delivers Strong Third-Quarter Results; Increases Full-Year Margin and EPS Guidance • GAAP sales of $6.5 billion, up 3.5%; operating margin 22.2%, up 130 bps; EPS of $1.55, down 38%, all YoY ◦ Adjusted sales of $6.3 billion with organic growth of 3.2% YoY ◦ Adjusted operating margin of 24.7%, up 170 bps YoY ◦ Adjusted EPS of $2.19, up 10% YoY • Operating cash flow of $1.8 billion with adjusted free cash flow of $1.3 billion • 2025 adjusted EPS guidance increased from $7.75 - $8.00 to $7.95 - $8.05 ST. PAUL, Minn. – October 21, 2025 − 3M (NYSE: MMM) today reported third-quarter 2025 results. “I am very pleased with our teams’ focus on reinvigorating  Normalized numeric aliases: $6.5 billion = 65억 달러; $6.3 billion = 63억 달러; $1.8 billion = 18억 달러; $1.3 billion = 13억 달러; $6.5 = 6.5달러; $1.55 = 1.55달러; $6.3 = 6.3달러; $2.19 = 2.19달러; $1.3 = 1.3달러; $1.8 = 1.8달러; $7.75 = 7.75달러; $8.00 = 8.00달러; $7.95 = 7.95달러; $8.05 = 8.05달러.

organic sales growth, increase margins, grow EPS double-digits and generate robust free cash flow. This progress gives us the confidence to raise our full-year margin and EPS guidance which positions us well to achieve the strategic and financial commitments we made at our Investor Day earlier this year.” Third-quarter highlights: Q3 2025 Q3 2024 GAAP EPS from continuing operations (GAAP EPS) $ 1.55 $ 2.48 Special items: Net costs for significant litigation 0.19 0.51 (Increase) decrease in value of Solventum ownership 0.13 (1.05) Manufactured PFAS products — 0.04 Loss on business divestitures 0.30 — Transformation costs 0.02 — Adjusted EPS from continuing operations (adjusted EPS) $ 2.19 $ 1.98 Memo: GAAP operating income margin 22.2 % 20.9 % Adjusted operating income margin 24.7 % 23.0 % • GAAP EPS of $1.55 and operating margin of 22.2%. • Adjusted EPS of $2.19, up 10%  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.55 = 1.55달러; $2.48 = 2.48달러; $2.19 = 2.19달러; $1.98 = 1.98달러.

• Adjusted operating income margin of 24.7%, an increase of 170 basis points year-on-year. GAAP Adjusted (non-GAAP) Net sales (billions) $6.5 $6.3 Sales change Total sales 3.5% 4.1% Components of sales change: Organic sales 2.6 3.2 Acquisitions/divestitures (0.1) (0.1) Translation 1.0 1.0 Adjusted sales excludes manufactured PFAS products. • Sales of $6.5 billion, up 3.5% year-on-year with organic sales up 2.6% year-on-year. • Adjusted sales of $6.3 billion, up 4.1% year-on-year with adjusted organic sales up 3.2% year-on-year. • 3M returned $0.9 billion to shareholders via dividends and share repurchases. • Cash from operations of $1.8 billion. • Adjusted free cash flow of $1.3 billion. This document includes reference to certain non-GAAP measures.  Normalized numeric aliases: $6.5 billion = 65억 달러; $6.3 billion = 63억 달러; $0.9 billion = 9억 달러; $1.8 billion = 18억 달러; $1.3 billion = 13억 달러; $6.5 = 6.5달러; $6.3 = 6.3달러; $0.9 = 0.9달러; $1.3 = 1.3달러; $1.8 = 1.8달러; 170 basis points = 170포인트.

its full-year 2025 guidance given the company’s performance in the first nine months of the year. • Adjusted total sales growth 1 of >2.5 percent, reflecting adjusted organic sales growth 1 of >2 percent. • Adjusted operating income margin expansion 1 of 180 bps to 200 bps. • Adjusted EPS 1 in the range of $7.95 to $8.05. • Adjusted operating cash flow 1 of $5.2 to $5.4 billion, contributing to >100 percent adjusted free cash flow conversion 1 . 1 As further discussed at 4 within the "Supplemental Financial Information Non-GAAP Measures" sections, 3M cannot, without unreasonable effort, forecast certain items required to develop meaningful comparable GAAP financial measures and, therefore, does not provide them on a forward-looking basis reflecting these items.
